name: AUTHORIZE_API_LOGIN_ID
description: Authorize.net API Login ID (Accept.js + charge API)

name: AUTHORIZE_CLIENT_KEY
description: Authorize.net public client key for Accept.js tokenization

name: AUTHORIZE_TRANSACTION_KEY
description: Authorize.net transaction key — never expose to the browser

name: AUTHORIZE_SANDBOX
description: Use Authorize.net sandbox when true (default). Set to false for production.
